title: Tuhi Re Mazha Mitwa
desc: Arnav, a not-so-happy businessman, has a traumatic past. However, when he crosses paths with Ishwari, a carefree girl, his life changes.

title: Tharala Tar Mag
desc: Arjun confronts Priya about her necklace being found in the hospital. Meanwhile, Asmita probes Pratap about freezing her account.

title: Aanandii
desc: Blaming herself for Aaba’s job loss, Aanandii surrenders her computer and takes on a new work as a tour guide. Meanwhile, the stakes rise for Yugandhar as he struggles to close a business deal.

title: Lagnanantar Hoilach Prem
desc: Ramya prepares a specific food item for Kavya. Later, Vijay intervenes to prevent its consumption before addressing Parth's statements regarding Ramya.

title: Lapandav
desc: A wealthy Pune couple's Saturday poetry evenings unravel when a love-letter sparks suspicions of infidelity, testing trust among two families and friends.

title: Tujhya Sobatine
desc: Bound by grief, Nupur and Malhar cross paths by fate and feel an instant connection. Love begins to heal them, but secrets from a tragic past threaten to shatter their fragile bond.
